description:
An open-source ebook reader designed for immersive and deep reading experiences.

Readest is a modern, feature-rich ebook reader designed for avid readers offering seamless cross-platform access, powerful tools, and an intuitive interface to elevate your reading experience.
Release Highlight
- TTS: Translation now works even when TTS is playing in the background
- TTS: Press T on your keyboard to quickly toggle TTS on or off
- TTS: Each open book now has its own independent TTS controller
- Annotations: Annotation tools now function properly while TTS is active
- Settings: Margins for top, bottom, left, and right can now be adjusted individually
- Settings: New option to always show the status bar while reading
- Layout: Reader page now adapts better to device safe areas for a more comfortable layout
- UI: Added creation timestamps to annotations and made various interface improvements
- iPad: Multiple columns are now supported in portrait mode 1
- iPad: Fixed issue where sidebars couldn't be resized by dragging 1
- iPad: Added support for split-screen mode
What's Changed
- tts: translation also when TTS is played in the background, closes #1383 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1399
- fix: restore full view settings when reopening book by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1400
- chore: add NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL in example env file by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1404
- feat: add keyboard shortcut t to toggle TTS by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1405
- fix: annotation tools now works when TTS is enabled, closes #1403 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1406
- layout: apply responsive safe area insets to the reader page, closes #1067 and closes #1212 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1408
- settings: individually adjust top, bottom, left, and right margins on the reader page by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1410
- tts: each book view now has its own tts controller by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1411
- feat: show annotation create time and various other UI fixes by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1412
- fix: now it's possible to have multiple columns in portrait mode, closes #1369 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1413
- layout: fix issue where sidebars couldn’t be dragged to resize on iPad by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1415
- feat: support split-screen mode on iPad, closes #971 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1416
- settings: add an option to always show status bar by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1417
- release: version 0.9.58 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1418
Full Changelog: https://github.com/readest/readest/compare/v0.9.57...v0.9.58
